rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single methods-side precedent: the authors note that Tavassoli, Sorescu, and Chandy (2014) used BoardEx in prior marketing research. It is not used to build hypotheses, mechanisms, variable construction, or interpretation of findings in this CMO gender study. The citation functions as a brief credibility/example reference for a data source rather than a meaningful intellectual basis for the paper's core argument.
